name: skill-creator-goal-prompt
description: Print portable goal prompts for creating agent skills, powers, prompts, and reusable workflow packs across coding agents and IDEs.

scripts.test: node bin/skill-creator-goal-prompt.js --help && node bin/skill-creator-goal-prompt.js --list-agents && node bin/skill-creator-goal-prompt.js --compact && node bin/skill-creator-goal-prompt.js --agent kiro-cli --compact && node bin/skill-creator-goal-prompt.js --agent codex --task "create a pdf workflow" --example "Rotate this PDF"
